goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 0'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture and should be in the centre

You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 0
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get price range and area
